text:
Name

 BENE_ID 
 Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID 

 FAC_DATA_SUBMSN_DT 
 Facility Data Submission Date 

 CCN

 PRVDR_STATE 
 Provider State 

 FAC_TIER 
 Tier 1: 25+ AHCAH Patients; Tier 2: <= 24 AHCAH Patients 

 STATE_BENE_MDCD_ID 
 Encrypted State-Specific Medicaid Beneficiary ID 

 PGM_ID 
 Program Identifier (1=FFS Medicare; 2=FFS Medicaid; 3=Dual) 

 ADMSN_DT 
 Facility Admission Date 

 AHCAH_WVR_SUBMSN_ID 
 AHCAH Waiver Submission ID
